creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just submitted a new PR with 4.80B,1. 

That port should resolve the 6.3 issues.  If it does NOT, the lsof author,
Vic Abell <abe@purdue.edu> would appreciate
access to a test system.

Thanks,
Larry Rosenman
sysutils/lsof maintainer
